statement: The specific structural defence of build-time data/instruction separation via a nonce data-fence in resolved agent artefacts was not found in any surveyed competitor and is a candidate genuine differentiator.

evidence.quote: language understanding to catch prompt injection and natural language malware that hides in the SKILL.md instructions.
recommends Unicode normalization (NFKC form) as a preprocessing defense layer before tokenization.

falsifier: Surveyed tools detect/normalise injection but none documents emitting a nonce-delimited data fence into the resolved artefact; finding one would falsify this.
